```esql
FROM mmr_text_vector_keyword
| SORT keyword_field
| LIMIT 10
| MMR ON text_vector LIMIT 3
| DROP text_vector, byte_vector, bit_vector
```

| keyword_field:keyword | text_body:text |
| --- | --- |
| test1 | first text |
| test3 | third text |
| test6 | sixth text |
